_comment: Shared junk-gate PARITY vectors (PR #51 review #7). The Dart client gate (capecho_capture_core isLikelyJunk, junk_filter_test.dart) AND the TS authoritative gate (backend src/input.ts isLikelyJunk, input.test.ts) BOTH assert against these, so the two hand-ported implementations can't silently diverge. 'pass' = isLikelyJunk MUST be false (a real unit that MUST reach /explain — the eng-review silent-failure guard). 'reject' = isLikelyJunk MUST be true (degenerate non-vocabulary). Keep the two implementations + this fixture in lockstep.
